description: Default unified inbox with Critical, Normal, and Low tabs, unread counters, source app labels, and grouped system messages.
Filtered inbox state showing swipe actions, archive affordance, notification detail preview, and priority badges.
Quiet Hours first-run setup with permission explainer, start time picker, end time picker, weekday selector, and critical alert exception copy.
Saved Quiet Hours confirmation state with editable schedule summary, temporary pause action, timezone note, and exception management.
Monday 8AM digest preview card with grouped highlights, missed normal notifications, low-priority rollups, and manage digest link.
iOS permission education screen preceding the native permission dialog, including critical alert explanation and settings recovery path.
Android notification permission screen with Android 13 runtime permission copy, channel controls, and deep link to app notification settings.
Priority management screen for Critical, Normal, and Low notification categories with examples, override rules, and digest eligibility toggles.
